# Vault Vista Color Token Reference

Full token list from `frontend/tailwind.config.ts`.

## Primary
| Token | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `primary` | Main action buttons, FAB |
| `on-primary` | Text/icon on primary |
| `primary-container` | Light primary surface |
| `on-primary-container` | Text on primary container |

## Secondary
| Token | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `secondary` | Secondary actions |
| `secondary-container` | Category chips, tags |
| `on-secondary-container` | Text on secondary container |

## Tertiary (Income/Positive)
| Token | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `tertiary` | Income amounts, positive trends |
| `tertiary-container` | Income cards bg |
| `on-tertiary-container` | Text on tertiary container |

## Error (Expense/Negative)
| Token | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `error` | Expense amounts, delete, warnings |
| `error-container` | Error backgrounds |

## Surface System
| Token | Level | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `surface` | L0 | Page background |
| `surface-container-low` | L1 | Sidebar, recessed panels |
| `surface-container` | L2 | Default card |
| `surface-container-high` | L3 | Elevated card, active state |
| `surface-container-highest` | L4 | Modal, bottom sheet |
| `on-surface` | — | Primary text |
| `on-surface-variant` | — | Secondary text |

## Outline
| Token | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `outline` | Stronger boundaries (use sparingly) |
| `outline-variant` | Subtle dividers, disabled states |
